metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.15-beta.19
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Adds a source-boundary fade to every SWS audio Preview. - Uses SWS audio-thread fade-out instead of UI-frame volume steps. - Keeps all six Preview toggles visible with both side panels open. - Shares one responsive height model between waveform reserve and controls.
